chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.106 of 2023 Mohsin Lakho Versus Asad Ejaz & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 5510/23 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA 5511/23 Dated: 06.03.2024 Mr. Niaz Ali Gopang for appellant. -.-.- Learned counsel submits that an out of Court settlement has taken place between the parties and as such he has been instructed not to press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
